responses: Hello! Welcome to the college inquiry bot. How can I help you today?
Hi there! What information do you need about the college?
Greetings! How may I assist you with your college queries?
Hey! Feel free to ask me about courses, fees, placements, or facilities.
Good day! How can I help you explore our campus?
Goodbye! Feel free to ask if you have more questions.
Have a great day ahead!
Bye! Good luck with your studies and career.
See you later! Don't hesitate to return if you need more info.
Take care! It was nice chatting with you.
You're welcome! Let me know if you need anything else.
Anytime! I'm here to help.
Glad I could help!
Happy to assist you!
You're very welcome. Have a wonderful day!
We offer B.Tech programs in Computer Science (CSE), Electronics and Communication (ECE), Mechanical Engineering (ME), and Civil Engineering (CE). We also have postgraduate MBA and MCA programs.
Available B.Tech branches include CSE, IT, ECE, EEE, Mechanical, and Civil Engineering.
Our flagship programs are the B.Tech degrees across core engineering disciplines (CSE, ME, CE, ECE). Check our website for detailed syllabi.
You can pursue B.Tech, M.Tech, MBA, and MCA degrees here. Which one are you interested in?

patterns: How much are the college fees?
responses: The tuition fee for B.Tech programs is approximately $5000 per year. Hostel accommodations cost an additional $1500 per year. For an exact breakdown, please contact the administration.
B.Tech fees are around $5000/year. Scholarships and financial aid are available for meritorious students.
Our general fee structure is $5000 per annum for tuition, and $1500 for hostel/mess. Semester-wise payment options are available.
Fees vary slightly by branch, but average $5000 a year for undergrads. You can pay in two semester installments.

patterns: Is the college open on weekends?
responses: The college timings are from 9:00 AM to 4:00 PM, Monday to Friday. The campus is closed for classes on weekends.
Classes generally run from 9:00 AM to 4:00 PM on weekdays. Administrative offices are open until 5:00 PM.
Our academic hours are 9 AM to 4 PM (Mon-Fri). Weekends are off, though labs and libraries may be open for project work.

patterns: Can I study in the library on Sunday?
Does the college have a library?
responses: The central library is open from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM on weekdays, and from 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM on weekends.
Library hours: Mon-Fri: 8 AM - 8 PM, Sat-Sun: 10 AM - 4 PM. We also have an extensive digital library accessible 24/7.
Yes, our massive central library is open daily! 8 AM to 8 PM on weekdays, giving you plenty of time to study after classes.

patterns: Tell me about the hostel rooms
responses: Yes, we have separate, secure hostels for boys and girls with 24/7 security, WiFi, and mess facilities. Rooms are twin-sharing.
Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls. The annual fee is $1500, which includes 4 meals a day in the mess.
Our campus provides excellent residential facilities. The hostels have gyms, rec rooms, and high-speed campus Wi-Fi.

patterns: How can I contact the college?
responses: You can reach the administration at admin@college.edu or call at +1-800-123-4567. Our campus is located at 123 University Avenue, City Center.
Contact us at +1-800-123-4567 or email admission@college.edu. Visit our main campus at 123 University Avenue.
Our address is 123 University Avenue. You can call the reception at +1-800-123-4567 during working hours.
Admissions are primarily based on national entrance exam scores (like JEE/SAT). The online application portal opens in May. Visit our website to apply.
You can apply online through the college website once the admission portal opens in May. Minimum 60% in high school is required for B.Tech.
The admission process involves applying online, submitting your entrance scores, and attending a brief counseling session. Portal opens in May.
We have a 95% placement record! Top recruiters include Google, Microsoft, Amazon, and TCS. The highest package last year was $120,000.
The average package is around $12,000 per annum, with the highest reaching $120,000. Over 200 companies visit our campus for recruitment.
Our dedicated Placement Cell ensures top-tier internships and job offers. We regularly host career fairs and on-campus recruitment drives.
We have over 30 active student clubs including Robotics, Coding, Drama, Music, and Debate. We also host a massive annual tech-fest!
Sports facilities are excellent! We have a cricket ground, basketball courts, and an indoor stadium. Our annual sports meet happens in February.
Clubs and extracurriculars are a huge part of our campus life. You can join the Google Developer Student Club, the Arts Society, or our varsity sports teams.
Yes, we provide a fleet of college buses covering all major routes in the city. The transport fee is $300 per semester.
College bus services are available for day scholars. The buses cover a 50km radius around the city. You can apply for a bus pass at the admin office.
We have excellent transport facilities. Safe and secure college buses operate morning and evening on over 20 different municipal routes.

patterns: How to get a fee waiver?
responses: Yes, we offer up to 100% tuition fee waivers for top rankers in the entrance exams, as well as sports scholarships.
Financial aid and merit-based scholarships are available. Students maintaining a CGPA above 9.0 are automatically eligible for the Dean's Scholarship.
We have numerous scholarship programs based on merit, financial need, and athletic achievements. Contact the financial aid office for details.
We have a multi-cuisine central cafeteria and several smaller food courts spread across the campus offering hygienic and affordable meals.
The college has 3 cafeterias, a coffee shop, and a juice bar! You'll never run out of food options on campus.
Yes, our massive food court serves everything from traditional meals to fast food. It's the ultimate hangout spot for students.
